chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-312 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 08.08.2023 Mr. Khadim Hussain Laghari advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ali Ahmed Palh advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- We have been assisted by learned AAG. It appears that the petitioner was on contract on yearly basis. The two contracts available at pages 15 and 13 pertain to the year 2002 and 2006. The last contract executed was on 05.05.2006 and that too for a year. The petitioner now seeks that respondents be directed to permanently appoint the petitioner on the basis of previous contractual assignments alone. This petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973 has been filed after almost 10 years. A premium of the services rendered by the petitioner on contract basis cannot be given as that contract itself is questionable as it was without any transparent codal formalities and a number of litigants who could have approached for their appointment on regular basis were deprived. Hence, no case of his appointment on permanent basis is made out on contractual service. Although the petitioner is called absent, the petition is dismissed in view of above. JUDGE JUDGE
